EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} renamed resource pool "{object.name}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} reconfigured resource pool "{object.name}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} removed resource pool "{object.name}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} moved resource pool "{object.name}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created resource pool "{object.name}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
